targets.rawSql: SELECT user_label, SUM(query_count) AS query_count FROM (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(username, 'unknown'), ' (', from_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_text_query' GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(u.username, 'unknown'), ' (', a.user_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM app_analytics a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.telegram_id = a.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(a.event_at) AND a.event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found') AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) q GROUP BY user_label ORDER BY query_count DESC;

SELECT user_label, SUM(query_count) AS query_count FROM (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(username, 'unknown'), ' (', from_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_found' GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(u.username, 'unknown'), ' (', a.user_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM app_analytics a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.telegram_id = a.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(a.event_at) AND a.event_name = 'strain-found' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) q GROUP BY user_label ORDER BY query_count DESC;

SELECT user_label, SUM(query_count) AS query_count FROM (SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(username, 'unknown'), ' (', from_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_not_found' GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(u.username, 'unknown'), ' (', a.user_id, ')') AS user_label, COUNT(*) AS query_count FROM app_analytics a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.telegram_id = a.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(a.event_at) AND a.event_name = 'strain-not-found' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) q GROUP BY user_label ORDER BY query_count DESC;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_found') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name = 'strain-found') AS successful_strain_queries;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_not_found') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name = 'strain-not-found') AS unsuccessful_strain_queries;

WITH x AS (SELECT event_name FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name IN ('bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN event_name='strain-found' THEN 'bot_strain_found' WHEN event_name='strain-not-found' THEN 'bot_strain_not_found' ELSE event_name END FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name IN ('strain-found','strain-not-found')) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_name = 'bot_strain_found') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS success_rate FROM x;

WITH activity AS (SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid, at AS ts FROM analytics_events WHERE from_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') UNION ALL SELECT user_id AS uid, event_at AS ts FROM app_analytics WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found')), scoped AS (SELECT uid, $__timeGroup(ts, $__interval) AS bucket FROM activity WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)), totals AS (SELECT bucket AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT uid)::double precision AS total_users FROM scoped GROUP BY 1), first_seen AS (SELECT uid, MIN(ts) AS first_seen FROM activity GROUP BY uid), news AS (SELECT $__timeGroup(first_seen, $__interval) AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS new_users FROM first_seen WHERE $__timeFilter(first_seen) GROUP BY 1), series AS (SELECT t.time, 'total_users'::text AS metric, t.total_users AS value FROM totals t UNION ALL SELECT t.time, 'new_users'::text AS metric, COALESCE(n.new_users, 0)::double precision AS value FROM totals t LEFT JOIN news n ON n.time = t.time UNION ALL SELECT t.time, 'returning_users'::text AS metric, GREATEST(t.total_users - COALESCE(n.new_users, 0), 0)::double precision AS value FROM totals t LEFT JOIN news n ON n.time = t.time) SELECT * FROM series ORDER BY time;

panels.title: New users vs returning users (over time)

targets.rawSql:
WITH activity AS (
  SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid, at AS ts
  FROM analytics_events
  WHERE event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found')
    AND from_id IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT user_id AS uid, event_at AS ts
  FROM app_analytics
  WHERE event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found')
    AND user_id IS NOT NULL
),

first_seen AS (
  SELECT
    uid,
    MIN(ts) AS first_seen_at
  FROM activity
  GROUP BY uid
),

daily_new AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(first_seen_at) AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS new_users
  FROM first_seen
  GROUP BY DATE(first_seen_at)
),

cumulative AS (
  SELECT
    day,
    SUM(new_users) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS total_users
  FROM daily_new
)

SELECT *
FROM cumulative
WHERE day <= $__timeTo()
  AND day >= $__timeFrom()
ORDER BY day;

WITH misses AS (SELECT COALESCE(query, strain_name, 'unknown') AS query, at AS ts, from_id::bigint AS uid, COALESCE(username, 'id:' || from_id::text) AS uname FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_not_found' UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(meta->>'query', meta->>'name', meta->>'key', 'unknown') AS query, event_at AS ts, user_id AS uid, COALESCE(u.username, 'id:' || a.user_id::text) AS uname FROM app_analytics a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.telegram_id = a.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(a.event_at) AND a.event_name = 'strain-not-found') SELECT query, COUNT(*) AS attempts, MAX(ts) AS last_seen, STRING_AGG(uname, ', ' ORDER BY ts DESC, uname ASC) AS users FROM misses GROUP BY query ORDER BY last_seen DESC, attempts DESC, query ASC;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS unique_users FROM (SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') AND from_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT user_id AS uid FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found') AND user_id IS NOT NULL) u;

WITH activity AS (SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid, at AS ts FROM analytics_events WHERE event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') AND from_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT user_id AS uid, event_at AS ts FROM app_analytics WHERE event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found') AND user_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.uid) AS new_users FROM activity a WHERE a.ts >= $__timeFrom() AND a.ts <= $__timeTo() AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM activity prev WHERE prev.uid = a.uid AND prev.ts < $__timeFrom());

WITH bounds AS (SELECT $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS start_time, $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS end_time), period AS (SELECT start_time, end_time, (end_time - start_time) AS duration FROM bounds), activity AS (SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid, at AS ts FROM analytics_events WHERE from_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') UNION ALL SELECT user_id AS uid, event_at AS ts FROM app_analytics WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found')), current_users AS (SELECT DISTINCT uid FROM activity, period WHERE ts >= period.start_time AND ts < period.end_time), previous_users AS (SELECT DISTINCT uid FROM activity, period WHERE ts >= (period.start_time - period.duration) AND ts < period.start_time) SELECT COUNT(*) AS returning_users FROM current_users cu JOIN previous_users pu ON cu.uid = pu.uid;

WITH activity AS (SELECT from_id::bigint AS uid FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND from_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('bot_text_query','bot_paste_link','bot_strain_found','bot_strain_not_found') UNION ALL SELECT user_id AS uid FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND event_name IN ('unknown-response','url-processed','strain-found','strain-not-found')) SELECT COUNT(*) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT uid), 0) AS queries_per_user FROM activity;

SELECT strain_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT COALESCE(strain_name, query, 'unknown') AS strain_name FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_found' UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(meta->>'name', meta->>'resolved', meta->>'query', 'unknown') AS strain_name FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name = 'strain-found') s GROUP BY strain_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT $__timeGroup(ts, $__interval) AS time, query, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT at AS ts, COALESCE(query, strain_name, 'unknown') AS query FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) AND event_name = 'bot_strain_found' UNION ALL SELECT event_at AS ts, COALESCE(meta->>'query', meta->>'name', meta->>'resolved', 'unknown') AS query FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) AND event_name = 'strain-found') q GROUP BY time, query ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  COALESCE(a.meta->>'query', a.meta->>'name') AS strain_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_searches,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS unique_users,
  STRING_AGG(
    DISTINCT COALESCE(u.username, a.user_id::text),
    ', '
    ORDER BY COALESCE(u.username, a.user_id::text)
  ) AS searched_by,
  STRING_AGG(
    TO_CHAR(a.event_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),
    ', '
    ORDER BY a.event_at
  ) AS search_times
FROM app_analytics a
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_id = a.user_id
WHERE a.event_name IN ('strain-found', 'strain-not-found')
  AND $__timeFilter(a.event_at)
  AND COALESCE(a.meta->>'query', a.meta->>'name') IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(a.meta->>'query', a.meta->>'name')
ORDER BY total_searches DESC;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', ts) AS time, COUNT(*) AS value, event_name FROM (SELECT at AS ts, event_name FROM analytics_events WHERE $__timeFilter(at) UNION ALL SELECT event_at AS ts, event_name FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)) e GROUP BY time, event_name ORDER BY time;
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(event_at, '5m'), event_name AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT event_name, event_status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) GROUP BY event_name, event_status ORDER BY n DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM broadcast_outgoing WHERE sent_time IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM subscriptions WHERE enabled = TRUE;
SELECT event_at, event_name, event_status, user_id, entity_id FROM app_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at) ORDER BY event_at DESC LIMIT 200;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM broadcast_outgoing WHERE sent_time IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(sent_time);
SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE telegram_message_id IS NOT NULL) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS value FROM broadcast_outgoing WHERE sent_time IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(sent_time);

SELECT broadcast_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sent_time IS NOT NULL) AS sent_rows, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE telegram_message_id IS NOT NULL) AS delivered_rows, MIN(created_at) AS first_queued_at, MAX(sent_time) AS last_sent_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(sent_time) - MIN(created_at)))::bigint AS queue_to_send_seconds FROM broadcast_outgoing WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY broadcast_id ORDER BY last_sent_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100;

panels.title: Broadcast timing and delivery by broadcast_id

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS encounter_distinct_users
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name = 'strain-collection-confirm'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT NULLIF(trim(meta->>'strain'), '')) AS encounter_distinct_strains
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name = 'strain-collection-confirm'
  AND NULLIF(trim(meta->>'strain'), '') IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS encounter_confirm_events
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name = 'strain-collection-confirm';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS encounter_remove_events
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name = 'strain-collection-remove';

SELECT $__timeGroup(event_at, $__interval) AS time,
       CASE WHEN event_name = 'strain-collection-confirm' THEN 'confirm' ELSE 'remove' END AS metric,
       COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name IN ('strain-collection-confirm', 'strain-collection-remove')
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(meta->>'strain'), ''), '(unknown)') AS strain,
       COUNT(*) AS confirmations
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name = 'strain-collection-confirm'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY confirmations DESC
LIMIT 15;

SELECT event_at,
       event_name,
       user_id,
       COALESCE(meta->>'strain', '') AS strain,
       COALESCE(meta->>'interaction_kind_raw', '') AS token_kind,
       COALESCE(meta->>'encounter_cnt', '') AS encounter_cnt_after,
       COALESCE(meta->>'removed', '') AS removed
FROM app_analytics
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_at)
  AND event_name IN (
    'strain-collection-confirm',
    'strain-collection-remove',
    'strain-collection-press-miss',
    'strain-collection-press-invalid',
    'strain-collection-press-error'
  )
ORDER BY event_at DESC
LIMIT 200;
